svg.title: Annual network KPI divergence
svg.desc: Complete-year means of VBB monthly punctuality and reliability, followed by the observed current year-to-date window. The two KPIs follow different patterns and are not a combined score.

text.style: fill: #138a70; font: 800 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 1.5px;

line.style: fill: none; stroke: #0f766e; stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;

text.style: fill: #627487; font: 600 12px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif;

line.style: fill: none; stroke: #1d4ed8; stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;

text.style: fill: #627487; font: 600 12px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif;
fill: #627487; font: 600 12px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif;
fill: #627487; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif;
fill: #627487; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif;
fill: #627487; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif;
fill: #627487; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif;

path.style: fill: none; stroke: #0f766e; stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;
fill: none; stroke: #0f766e; stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-dasharray: 7 6;
fill: none; stroke: #1d4ed8; stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;
fill: none; stroke: #1d4ed8; stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-dasharray: 7 6;

text.style: fill: #102a43; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800;
fill: #102a43; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800;
fill: #102a43; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800;
fill: #102a43; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800;
fill: #102a43; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800;
fill: #102a43; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800;
fill: #102a43; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800;
fill: #102a43; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800;
fill: #102a43; font: 600 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 12px;

svg.text: Each point is an unweighted mean of the published monthly percentages; the two KPIs are not a combined score.
